package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for request_body_read_without_size_limit: HTTP request bodies read or decoded without an observed size limit such as io.LimitReader or http.MaxBytesReader.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: warning.
func scenario392Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	client := &http.Client{}
	return client.Get(url)
}
